heroHeadline: Russia's Full-Scale War Against Ukraine — Day 1,485
heroSubtitle: Active conflict along 1,000+ km frontline in eastern and southern Ukraine. Negotiations ongoing without breakthrough. ~20% of Ukraine under Russian occupation.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, NYT, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
